items.summary: Audit and verify that all 120 gallery image files (residential-1.png through residential-40.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-40.png, before-after-1.png through before-after-40.png) physically exist as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with correct filenames and valid image file formats

Fix the Portfolio component image path construction to correctly reference all 120 gallery images using the absolute path pattern '/assets/generated/{category}-{number}.png' where category is 'residential', 'commercial', or 'before-after' and number ranges from 1 to 40

Enhance error logging in the Portfolio component to capture and display detailed debugging information for each failed image load, including the complete attempted URL, HTTP status code, network error details, and CORS headers if applicable

Verify the Vite/build configuration correctly serves static assets from the frontend/public directory and that the /assets/generated/ path is accessible at runtime without being transformed or relocated during the build process

Regenerate any missing, corrupted, or improperly formatted gallery images among the 120 total images, ensuring all images are valid PNG files with appropriate dimensions (minimum 800x600 pixels) and represent high-quality interior design photography
